params.name: From the New World
params.description:
On Oct 31, 1893 AD, Dvo?ák's Symphony From the New World was performed for the first time in New York, and it was a huge success.
From the New World, also known as Symphony No. 9, is a work by the famous nineteenth-century composer Dvo?ák. The piece is inspired by local Black and Native American music that the composer heard after coming to America, and he expressed this inspiration through his own melodies. Although the work carries the strong characteristics of Czech music, it is considered …
